en.name: Level 10 — Bumper Crop
en.shortDescription: Endless wheat and barley fields under an overcast sky, dotted with empty structures and lakes, with worms burrowing beneath the soil.
en.atmosphere: Dreary, unchanging pastoral expanse under permanent overcast, calm but for underlying mysteries beneath the fields.
en.tips: Follow the roads toward Level 11. Gather supplies from empty structures. Dig with caution — the worms surface fast.
